## Checklist

- [ ] Code is English-only (comments, identifiers, commit messages)
- [ ] User-facing strings go through the i18n layer (no new hardcoded strings)
- [ ] If web-ui strings changed: keys added to **both** `en.json` and `pt-BR.json`
- [ ] `make test` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt` + `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` are clean
- [ ] Web UI (if touched): `npm run typecheck` + `npm run build` pass
